IRS990EZ.PrimaryExemptPurposeTxt: TO RAISE FUNDS FOR DOG RESCUES AND SHELTERS.

ProgramSrvcAccomplishmentGrp.DescriptionProgramSrvcAccomTxt: TO RAISE FUNDS BY SELLING JEWELRY AND DONATING TO VARIOUS DOG RESCUES. IN 2021, WE DONATED TO 92 DIFFERENT DOG RESCUES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990-EZ, PART I, LINE 7 - SALES OF INVENTORY
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: INCOME: GROSS RECEIPTS: 56,268. RETURNS AND ALLOWANCES: 0. LESS COST OF GOODS SOLD: 10,626. GROSS PROFIT: 45,642. COST OF GOODS SOLD: INVENTORY AT BEGINNING OF YEAR: 10,509. MERCHANDISE PURCHASED: 6,300. COST OF LABOR: 0. MATERIALS AND SUPPLIES: 0. OTHER COSTS: 0. INVENTORY AT END OF YEAR: 6,183. COST OF GOODS SOLD: 10,626.

TransferPrsnlBnftContractsDecl.DeclarationDesc: THE ORGANIZATION DID NOT, DURING THE YEAR, RECEIVE ANY FUNDS, DIRECTLY,OR INDIRECTLY, TO PAY PREMIUMS ON A PERSONAL BENEFIT CONTRACT.THE ORGANIZATION, DID NOT, DURING THE YEAR, PAY ANY PREMIUMS, DIRECTLY,OR INDIRECTLY, ON A PERSONAL BENEFIT CONTRACT.
